overall.description: First-person exploration gameplay showing movement through a dimly lit wooden house interior, ascending to an attic room, then exiting to a moonlit rural village landscape with rocky cliffs and scattered buildings. The footage transitions from warm artificial lighting indoors to cool moonlight outdoors.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit wooden interior hallway with stairs

events.description: begins ascending wooden staircase from ground floor

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow corridors and climbing the creaky wooden stairs in a candlelit house

entered.detail: steep wooden stairs with worn steps and simple railing
wall-mounted iron lantern casting warm yellow light
multi-paned window with wooden frame showing darkness outside
closed wooden door at the end of the hallway
simple wooden handrail along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, dimly lit wooden hallway. The camera moves forward past a wall-mounted lantern and begins ascending a steep wooden staircase. The atmosphere is tense and claustrophobic, with textured walls and a closed door visible at the far end of the initial corridor.

events.description: enters upper attic room with sloped wooden ceilings and patterned wallpaper
turns and begins descending back down the stairs

agents.ego_description: exploring the furnished attic room with red patterned wallpaper, examining the bed and lamp before turning back

entered.detail: angled wooden ceiling beams creating a cramped attic space
red diamond-patterned wallpaper covering the walls
tall standing lamp with glowing white globe shade
simple wooden bed frame with white sheets
framed landscape painting hanging on the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a cramped attic room with distinctive red patterned wallpaper and sloped wooden ceilings. A floor lamp illuminates a wooden bed and dresser. After briefly exploring, the camera turns and descends back toward the stairs, passing a framed painting on the wall.

events.description: opens wooden exit door revealing dark outdoor night
steps outside as vision adjusts to moonlight revealing distant house

agents.ego_description: descending the final stairs and opening the exit door to step out into the night

entered.detail: heavy wooden door leading to the exterior
distant house with lit windows visible through the doorway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the lower hallway toward the exit door. Upon opening it, the scene transitions abruptly from warm interior light to pitch darkness, then gradually reveals a moonlit outdoor landscape with a distant house visible through the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village at night with rocky cliffs

events.description: pan reveals large stone cliff formation and wooden bridge with village lights

agents.ego_description: walking through grassy terrain observing the moonlit village, rocky cliffs, and starry sky

entered.detail: large rocky mountain formation rising behind the village
wooden footbridge crossing a small ravine
lamp post with warm light illuminating the path
tall pine trees surrounding the clearing
grassy terrain with small white flowers
dark blue night sky with scattered stars and clouds

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a moonlit rural landscape, revealing a village nestled against a large stone cliff formation. A wooden bridge and street lamps dot the terrain. The house that was distant is now passed on the left as the camera explores the open area, with the starry night sky visible above and trees framing the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic interior of a dimly lit wooden house into a vast, moonlit rural landscape. It begins in a narrow hallway, moving past a wall-mounted lantern and ascending a steep wooden staircase. As the camera enters a cramped attic with red patterned wallpaper and sloped ceilings, it briefly explores the room before turning back to descend the stairs and head toward the exit. The scene then shifts abruptly as the door opens, transitioning from warm indoor lighting into a deep darkness that gradually reveals a starry night sky and a distant house. Finally, the camera moves outward into the open air, passing a wooden bridge and street lamps as the view expands to show a village nestled against a massive stone cliff.
